content.text:
<user_query>
Thoroughness: medium. In /Users/duhl/git/anedot_next, locate the docs/OpenAPI spec files and summarize the documented API surface. Return method/path entries, documented request params/body, auth/security, status codes, and response schemas. Do not modify files.
</user_query>

Searching `docs/` for OpenAPI/Swagger specs and summarizing the documented API surface.

[REDACTED]

## Location note

There is **no** OpenAPI/Swagger YAML or JSON under `/Users/duhl/git/anedot_next/docs/` (that tree has no matching specs). The documented HTTP surface lives here:

| Path | Role |
|------|------|
| `/Users/duhl/git/anedot_next/doc/openapi.yaml` | Full **OpenAPI 3.0.3** document (`paths`, `components`) |
| `/Users/duhl/git/anedot_next/config/openapi.yml` | Generator/config metadata (`security_schemes`, `tags`, `skip_controllers`, `model_map`, empty `paths: {}`) |

---

## Global metadata (`doc/openapi.yaml`)

- **Title:** Anedot API **v1.0.0**
- **Server:** `/`
- **Global security:** `CognitoJwt` (Bearer JWT)
- **Exception:** `GET /up` sets `security: []` (no auth)

---

## Auth / security

- **Scheme:** `CognitoJwt` — `type: http`, `scheme: bearer`, `bearerFormat: JWT`; described as AWS Cognito ID or access token in `Authorization: Bearer <token>`.
- **Components also define** `Unauthorized` (JSON `{ error: string }`) but **no operation lists it** under `responses` (only documented for potential reuse).

---

## Shared parameters

Most routes reuse:

- **`id`** — path, required `integer`
- **`legal_entity_id`** — query, optional `integer` (“legal entity context”)
- **`vendor_id`** — query, optional `integer` (“vendor context”)

Additional query params are noted per path below.

---

## Operations (method, path, params/body, status codes, response schema)

Unless noted, successful JSON is `application/json`. **`GET /users/me`** documents **200** only with description “Success” — **no response schema**.

| Method | Path | Params / body | Status codes | Success / error schema |
|--------|------|---------------|--------------|-------------------------|
| GET | `/up` | none | 200 | No response body schema |
| GET | `/users/me` | `vendor_id` | 200 | Body not specified |
| GET | `/legal_entities` | `legal_entity_id`, `vendor_id` | 200 | `LegalEntity[]` |
| POST | `/legal_entities` | same + body **`LegalEntityCreate`** (required) | 201, 422 | `LegalEntity` / `UnprocessableEntity` |
| GET | `/legal_entities/{id}` | `id`, `legal_entity_id`, `vendor_id` | 200, 404 | `LegalEntity` / `NotFound` |
| PUT | `/legal_entities/{id}` | same + body **`LegalEntityUpdate`** | 200, 404, 422 | `LegalEntity` / `NotFound` / `UnprocessableEntity` |
| GET | `/legal_entity_memberships` | `legal_entity_id`, `vendor_id` | 200 | `LegalEntityMembership[]` |
| DELETE | `/legal_entity_memberships/{id}` | `id`, `legal_entity_id`, `vendor_id` | 204, 404 | empty / `NotFound` |
| GET | `/my_invites` | `vendor_id` | 200 | `Invite[]` |
| POST | `/my_invites/{id}/accept` | `id`, `vendor_id` | 200, 404, 422 | `Invite` / … |
| POST | `/my_invites/{id}/decline` | `id`, `vendor_id` | 200, 404, 422 | `Invite` / … |
| GET | `/invites` | `legal_entity_id`, `vendor_id` | 200 | `Invite[]` |
| POST | `/invites` | same + body **`InviteCreate`** (required) | 201, 422 | `Invite` / `UnprocessableEntity` |
| GET | `/invites/{id}` | `id`, `legal_entity_id`, `vendor_id` | 200, 404 | `Invite` / `NotFound` |
| DELETE | `/invites/{id}` | same | 204, 404 | empty / `NotFound` |
| POST | `/invites/{id}/accept` | same | 200, 404, 422 | `Invite` / … |
| POST | `/invites/{id}/decline` | same | 200, 404, 422 | `Invite` / … |
| GET | `/merchants` | `legal_entity_id`, `vendor_id` | 200 | `Merchant[]` |
| GET | `/merchants/{id}` | `id`, … | 200, 404 | `Merchant` / `NotFound` |
| GET | `/submerchants` | `legal_entity_id`, `vendor_id` | 200 | `Submerchant[]` |
| GET | `/submerchants/{id}` | `id`, … | 200, 404 | `Submerchant` / `NotFound` |
| GET | `/campaigns` | `legal_entity_id`, `vendor_id` | 200 | `Campaign[]` |
| POST | `/campaigns` | same + body **`CampaignCreate`** (required) | 201, 422 | `Campaign` / `UnprocessableEntity` |
| GET | `/campaigns/{id}` | `id`, … | 200, 404 | `Campaign` / `NotFound` |
| PUT | `/campaigns/{id}` | same + body **`CampaignUpdate`** | 200, 404, 422 | `Campaign` / … |
| GET | `/campaign_pages` | `legal_entity_id`, `vendor_id`, **`active`** (boolean), **`campaign_id`** (int) | 200 | `CampaignPage[]` |
| POST | `/campaign_pages` | … + body **`CampaignPageCreate`** (required) | 201, 422 | `CampaignPage` / … |
| GET | `/campaign_pages/{id}` | `id`, … | 200, 404 | `CampaignPage` / `NotFound` |
| PUT | `/campaign_pages/{id}` | … + body **`CampaignPageUpdate`** | 200, 404, 422 | `CampaignPage` / … |
| GET | `/customers` | … + **`campaign_id`**, **`email`** (string) | 200 | `Customer[]` |
| POST | `/customers` | … + body **`CustomerCreate`** (required) | 201, 422 | `Customer` / … |
| GET | `/customers/{id}` | `id`, … | 200, 404 | `Customer` / `NotFound` |
| PUT | `/customers/{id}` | … + body **`CustomerUpdate`** | 200, 404, 422 | `Customer` / … |
| GET | `/campaign_customers` | … + **`campaign_id`**, **`campaign_page_id`**, **`customer_id`** | 200 | `CampaignCustomer[]` |
| GET | `/campaign_customers/{id}` | `id`, … | 200, 404 | `CampaignCustomer` / `NotFound` |
| GET | `/charges` | … + **`campaign_id`**, **`vendor_legal_entity_id`** | 200 | `Charge[]` |
| GET | `/charges/{id}` | `id`, … | 200, 404 | `Charge` / `NotFound` |
| GET | `/vendor-links` | `vendor_id`, **`client_legal_entity_id`**, **`vendor_legal_entity_id`** | 200 | `VendorLegalEntityLink[]` |
| POST | `/vendor-links` | `vendor_id` + body **`VendorLegalEntityLinkCreate`** (required) | 201, 422 | `VendorLegalEntityLink` / … |
| GET | `/vendor-links/{id}` | `id`, `vendor_id` | 200, 404 | `VendorLegalEntityLink` / `NotFound` |
| GET | `/vendor-grants` | `vendor_id`, **`client_legal_entity_id`**, **`vendor_legal_entity_id`** | 200 | `VendorAccessGrant[]` |
| POST | `/vendor-grants` | `vendor_id` only (**no `requestBody` in spec**) | 201, 422 | `VendorAccessGrant` / `UnprocessableEntity` |
| GET | `/vendor-grants/{id}` | `id`, `vendor_id` | 200, 404 | `VendorAccessGrant` / `NotFound` |
| DELETE | `/vendor-grants/{id}` | `id`, `vendor_id` | 204, 404 | empty / `NotFound` |

---

## Documented error responses (`components.responses`)

- **`NotFound`:** `{ "error": string }` (example: “Record not found”).
- **`UnprocessableEntity`:** `{ "errors": string[] }`.
- **`Unauthorized`:** `{ "error": string }` — defined but **not wired** to operations in this file.

---

## Schema inventory (`components.schemas`)

Full property lists are in the YAML for: `User`, `LegalEntity`, `LegalEntityCreate` / `Update`, `LegalEntityMembership`, `LegalEntityMembershipCreate` / `Update`, `Invite`, `InviteCreate` / `Update`, `Merchant`, `Submerchant`, `Campaign`, `CampaignCreate` / `Update`, `CampaignPage`, `CampaignPageCreate` / `Update`, `Customer`, `CustomerCreate` / `Update`, `CampaignCustomer`, `Charge`, `VendorLegalEntityLink`, `VendorLegalEntityLinkCreate` / `Update`, `VendorAccessGrant`.

**Note:** Several create/update schemas exist (`LegalEntityMembershipCreate`, etc.) that are **not referenced** by any `paths` entry in this spec.

---
